transcript: This is the day my life as a nanny in Germany, and today I'm being the private chef. I stopped to get coffee first to function better, and then I went straight to work. The moment I got there, the girl wanted to have a yogurt bowl, so I made her one. These are amazing, so good and so easy to make. And then I started working on dinner and making them Spanish pancakes. These are savory pancakes with fish, which they actually requested, so I just had to follow a recipe. made a mess of out of herself trying to help me um we worked on this together it's always fun to cook dinner together and to keep her like occupied and i can do my work she helped me with the spices and then we cooked the first bunch um we tried that first because it was so good oh my god this was really a success and we tried it with aioli spicy aioli it was so good we played together watched barbie and then she gifted me this she made it herself so cute and then i went home
